response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The video consists of conversational English speech. The provided reference was empty for spoken lyrics since it is a conversational promotion segment. 2. JSON Usage: The audio was manually transcribed and translated directly from the spoken English track. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all spoken dialogue to precise vocal bursts, and included the visual text slide at the end of the video for the duration of its appearance.

subtitles.original: Woo! Oh!
subtitles.english: Woo! Oh!

subtitles.original: Thank you very much, everyone, for...
subtitles.english: Thank you very much, everyone, for...

subtitles.original: And hello! Oh, sorry! Oh, sorry.
subtitles.english: And hello! Oh, sorry! Oh, sorry.

subtitles.original: Let's do it, Cecilia! Do it with green!
subtitles.english: Let's do it, Cecilia! Do it with green!

subtitles.original: Thank you very much for being here today, everyone!
subtitles.english: Thank you very much for being here today, everyone!

subtitles.original: Thank you for today! Stage of Justice! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Thank you for today! Stage of Justice! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Please keep supporting us and listen to our song!
subtitles.english: Please keep supporting us and listen to our song!

subtitles.original: Stream Supernova Super Girl! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Stream Supernova Super Girl! Yeah!

subtitles.original: All right! Elizabeth is about to speak!
subtitles.english: All right! Elizabeth is about to speak!

subtitles.original: What I think? I think the stage is very cool. Look at the stage! Wow!
subtitles.english: What I think? I think the stage is very cool. Look at the stage! Wow!

subtitles.original: And look at this amazing team. I couldn't ask for a better team!
subtitles.english: And look at this amazing team. I couldn't ask for a better team!

subtitles.original: I love you girls! I love you all very much! Aww!
subtitles.english: I love you girls! I love you all very much! Aww!

subtitles.original: And Justiaz, we love you all very much too. Thank you so much for supporting Justice!
subtitles.english: And Justiaz, we love you all very much too. Thank you so much for supporting Justice!

subtitles.original: Thank you so, so, so much! I love you so much!
subtitles.english: Thank you so, so, so much! I love you so much!

subtitles.original: So many kisses! Justiaz is so spoiled! Okay, Gigi...
subtitles.english: So many kisses! Justiaz is so spoiled! Okay, Gigi...

subtitles.original: (Kissing sounds) Are you eating that? She's eating that! Oh my god!
subtitles.english: (Kissing sounds) Are you eating that? She's eating that! Oh my god!

subtitles.original: Thanks, Justiaz, for partying with us for... two years! Two!
subtitles.english: Thanks, Justiaz, for partying with us for... two years! Two!

subtitles.original: I didn't even know Raora could count to two! Hey! Really, really!
subtitles.english: I didn't even know Raora could count to two! Hey! Really, really!

subtitles.original: But we made it to two years! Yeah! Thank you for partying!
subtitles.english: But we made it to two years! Yeah! Thank you for partying!

subtitles.original: Please stream Supernova Super Girl!
subtitles.english: Please stream Supernova Super Girl!

subtitles.original: And learn the... The chants!
subtitles.english: And learn the... The chants!

subtitles.original: Learn the chants! For some reason, maybe you should learn the chants.
subtitles.english: Learn the chants! For some reason, maybe you should learn the chants.

subtitles.original: I wonder if there is a lyrics somewhere...
subtitles.english: I wonder if there is a lyrics somewhere...

subtitles.original: ...for you to learn when we go... Supernova... Super Girl!
subtitles.english: ...for you to learn when we go... Supernova... Super Girl!

subtitles.original: Or... Minna happiness!
subtitles.english: Or... Minna happiness!

subtitles.original: Minna happiness! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Minna happiness! Yeah!

subtitles.original: We all feel like super girls because of you guys. Thank you so much! Yes!
subtitles.english: We all feel like super girls because of you guys. Thank you so much! Yes!

subtitles.original: And don't forget to grab the merch! Purchase our merch!
subtitles.english: And don't forget to grab the merch! Purchase our merch!

subtitles.original: Yes, thank you, thank you, thank you all so much for celebrating with us today!
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you, thank you, thank you all so much for celebrating with us today!

subtitles.original: Please keep supporting Justice, please, going forward as well.
subtitles.english: Please keep supporting Justice, please, going forward as well.

subtitles.original: Now then, let's all say goodbye together with our own chant! Yay!
subtitles.english: Now then, let's all say goodbye together with our own chant! Yay!

subtitles.original: Are you ready? I'm ready.
subtitles.english: Are you ready? I'm ready.

subtitles.original: Justice... just like that!
subtitles.english: Justice... just like that!

subtitles.original: Justice... get, get, get down! Woo!
subtitles.english: Justice... get, get, get down! Woo!

subtitles.original: Minna happiness!
subtitles.english: Minna happiness!

subtitles.original: Minna happiness! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Minna happiness! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Stay tuned for the premier of Justice's new MV "SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL" right after this!
subtitles.english: Stay tuned for the premier of Justice's new MV "SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL" right after this!
